task_goal: Extract valid relations between already-extracted entities strictly grounded in the input text. Relations must use only entities provided in the entity list and only relation types defined in the selected relation group schema.
global_constraints: Do NOT invent entities not present in the extracted entity list.
Do NOT invent relation types not present in the selected relation group schema.
Do NOT extract relations if either side is missing from the extracted entity list.
If evidence is ambiguous or speculative, do NOT extract the relation.
Output JSON only. Do NOT include commentary or extra text.

relation_groups.group_goal: Link entities to Events and Occasions (agent, patient, participation, initiation).
group_constraints: Prefer extracting relations that connect Characters/Concepts/Objects to Events/Occasions when strongly supported.

relation_groups.group_goal: Extract stable or phase-level social relationships between Characters and/or Concepts.
group_constraints: Use only when the text explicitly establishes a relationship state, not a one-off interaction.

relation_groups.group_goal: Anchor events/occasions/entities to TimePoint and Location nodes.
group_constraints: Only extract if the anchor entity (Location/TimePoint) exists in the extracted entity list.

relation_groups.group_goal: Extract type, part-whole, or possession relations (is_a, part_of, possesses).
group_constraints: Only extract is_a/part_of/possesses if the text explicitly supports the classification/containment/possession.
